hook: What would you do differently if your next ₹10,000 had a clear job?

slides.text: What would you do differently if your next ₹10,000 had a clear job?
slides.visual: Use assets/logos/logo.png exactly as supplied, topic title, and one clean visual cue.

slides.text: You have ₹10,000 available, but you are split between spending it, saving it, starting a SIP, or keeping it for emergencies.
slides.visual: Show a relatable young investor decision with simple labels and large mobile-readable text.

slides.text: Inflation helps you give money a purpose instead of reacting emotionally to every choice.
slides.visual: Use a plain-English explainer card with one idea only.

slides.text: If you receive ₹10,000, you might split it between emergency cash, a SIP, and a goal-based bucket. The point is not excitement; it is direction.
slides.visual: Use a practical example card with portfolio, SIP, risk, or Rs 10,000 decision framing.

slides.text: Use inflation as a decision filter, not as a shortcut.
slides.visual: Use a strong one-line takeaway with accent highlight.

slides.text: Save this before planning your next money goal.
slides.visual: Show CTA, disclaimer, tagline "Build Wealth. Not Debt.", and assets/logos/logo.png without editing the logo.

cta: Save this before planning your next money goal.

compliance.disclaimer: Educational content only. This is not financial advice.
